summary: TIMEZONE FIX VERIFIED - All tests pass. Backend timestamps now include Z suffix for UTC indication. Frontend date grouping correctly shows 'Today' for today's events, not 'Tomorrow'. User timezone field (America/Denver) is returned in login response.

issues: Minor: Console shows 'Unexpected text node' warnings for View components - cosmetic only, no functional impact

backend_timestamp_z_suffix.contact_events_api: PASS - All timestamps have Z suffix (e.g., 2026-03-02T19:43:34.134000Z)
backend_timestamp_z_suffix.contacts_list_api: PASS - created_at, updated_at fields have Z suffix
backend_timestamp_z_suffix.master_feed_api: PASS - All feed item timestamps have Z suffix
backend_timestamp_z_suffix.activity_feed_api: PASS - All activity timestamps have Z suffix
backend_timestamp_z_suffix.specific_contact_api: PASS - birthday, anniversary, date_sold fields have Z suffix

frontend_date_grouping.contact_page_relationship_feed: PASS - Shows 'TODAY' with 17 events, no 'Tomorrow' mislabeling
frontend_date_grouping.activity_tab: PASS - Shows 'TODAY' with 16 events, 'YESTERDAY' for yesterday's events
frontend_date_grouping.groupByDate_function: PASS - Uses calendar-day comparison (lines 46-59 in activity.tsx)

verified_fixes.UTCJSONResponse_class: server.py lines 42-52 - Regex pattern appends Z to naive datetime ISO strings in JSON responses
verified_fixes._ts_iso_helper: contact_events.py lines 14-21 - Explicitly adds Z suffix to datetime strings
verified_fixes.formatEventTime_calendar_comparison: [id].tsx lines 91-124 - Compares dates by year/month/day instead of raw milliseconds
verified_fixes.groupEventsByDate_calendar_comparison: [id].tsx lines 867-881 - Groups events by calendar date, not timestamp diff
verified_fixes.activity_groupByDate: activity.tsx lines 46-59 - Same calendar-day comparison for Activity tab

context_for_next_testing_agent: Timezone fix verified working. Backend UTCJSONResponse class auto-appends Z suffix to all naive datetime strings in JSON responses. Frontend formatEventTime and groupEventsByDate use calendar-day comparison (year/month/day) instead of raw millisecond diff to correctly determine 'Today' vs 'Yesterday' vs future dates. Forest Ward's timezone is America/Denver. Playwright browser runs in UTC timezone.

mocked_api.twilio_sms: MOCKED - Personal SMS flow opens native SMS app instead of sending via Twilio
